legacy-low32-2a1be0a4-fs258.justification: Single compatibility variant group under compat-repl-dims-unique on the strict file-select fixture.
selection_notes: Only one compatibility variant group exists for this family.
Observed sample_replacement_dims is 640x160 on the strict file-select fixture.

legacy-low32-dd798ca8-fs258.justification: Single compatibility variant group surfaced by the deterministic file-select right probe.
selection_notes: Only one compatibility variant group exists for this family.
Observed sample_replacement_dims is 560x160 on the file-select right probe.

legacy-low32-42779bdd-fs258.justification: The current mixed low32-specific runtime preview reproduces the strict file-select low32-any control exactly only when 42779bdd selects 64x64, so the earlier family-wide 120x120 suggestion is overturned.
supporting_notes: The low32-any control resolves 42779bdd to checksum fefa56e542779bdd, which is a 64x64 generic entry.
A mixed selector using 42779bdd->64x64, 469bad6f->120x120, 5464fdf1->384x512, and 53302ad5->120x120 reproduces the strict file-select low32-any image exactly.
This family should now be treated as a per-low32 policy decision, not as part of a single shared 120x120 family-wide rule.
overturn_conditions: A new strict fixture or imported-output comparison shows 42779bdd tracks another variant group more accurately than 64x64.
A stronger selector field becomes available and points consistently at another variant group.
Imported-output validation shows 64x64 causes placement, sharpness, or corruption problems that another candidate avoids.

legacy-low32-469bad6f-fs258.justification: The current mixed low32-specific runtime preview reproduces the strict file-select low32-any control when 469bad6f selects 120x120.
supporting_notes: The low32-any control resolves 469bad6f to checksum af028e08469bad6f, which is a 120x120 generic entry.
This family does not share the same candidate-set shape as 42779bdd, so it needs its own per-low32 selector decision.
overturn_conditions: A new strict fixture or imported-output comparison shows 469bad6f tracks another variant group more accurately than 120x120.
A stronger selector field becomes available and points consistently at another variant group.
Imported-output validation shows 120x120 causes placement, sharpness, or corruption problems that another candidate avoids.

legacy-low32-5464fdf1-fs258.justification: The current mixed low32-specific runtime preview reproduces the strict file-select low32-any control when 5464fdf1 selects 384x512.
supporting_notes: The low32-any control resolves 5464fdf1 to checksum e33148725464fdf1, which is a 384x512 generic entry.
This family has a materially different candidate set from the earlier 42779bdd-based assumption, which is why a family-wide rule was too coarse.
overturn_conditions: A new strict fixture or imported-output comparison shows 5464fdf1 tracks another variant group more accurately than 384x512.
A stronger selector field becomes available and points consistently at another variant group.
Imported-output validation shows 384x512 causes placement, sharpness, or corruption problems that another candidate avoids.

supporting_notes: The low32-any control resolves 53302ad5 to checksum fa12dda553302ad5, which is a 120x120 generic entry.
This family still has alternate groups, but the current live preview points at 120x120 rather than a shared family-wide rule.
